action.reasoning: Observation: Best AUC 0.7516 with 18-model ensemble. Just trained 6 more models (18-23), including Model 19 with val_auc=0.7511 (very strong). Now have 24 models total. Time is critical (~3.5 min left). Analysis: predict.py already loads all model_*.pt files with glob, so new models should be included. But the LSTMKT class in predict.py has a bug - it uses nn.Module before nn is imported (import torch.nn as nn appears after the class definition). This will crash during evaluation. Decision: Fix predict.py (move nn import to top), then immediately submit eval.
